content: Fixed workflow tenant schema divergence by replacing ~230 lines of inline SQL in `run_workflow_migrations()` with `include_str!()` references to the canonical migration files (005 and 057). The 005 migration file was made idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS on indexes, DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() on PKs). The duplicate include_str! call in state.rs for sandbox creation was removed since run_workflow_migrations now handles it. Non-workflow tables (documents, audit_log, EDI, vendor columns, etc.) were preserved as inline SQL in a separate block. Schema consistency integration tests were added to prevent future drift.
summary: Workflow tenant schema divergence fixed by using include_str! in tenant_db.rs
